home.title: Zuki Apps
home.subtitle: Mobile App Developer from Israel
home.tagline: Creating smart and intuitive mobile applications that make everyday life easier

story.title: My Story
story.p1: Between 2012 and 2016, I developed mobile applications as part of the dreamBit team. During those years, I had the opportunity to work on various projects, learning the ins and outs of mobile development and creating apps that users loved.
story.p2: After a long break from active development, I've returned to pursue my passion - mobile app development. This time, I'm building apps as a hobby, driven by my love for technology and creativity.
story.p3: Today, I focus on developing smart and intuitive mobile applications that can help people in their daily lives. Each app I create is crafted with attention to detail, user experience, and innovative solutions to real-world problems.

zuliMonsters.title: Zuli Monsters
zuliMonsters.description: One of the unique aspects of my apps are the original illustrations I create, which I call Zuli Monsters.
zuliMonsters.more: These cute and colorful creatures accompany users throughout their app experience, adding a touch of fun and personality to every interaction. You'll be hearing more about them soon!

home.underConstructionMessage: We're working hard to bring you something amazing. Check back soon!

zulist.title: ZuList
zulist.subtitle: My first app - Smart shopping list management
zulist.description: ZuList is a Flutter-based shopping list application designed to make grocery shopping easier and more collaborative. With real-time sharing, offline support, and smart product recommendations, it's the perfect companion for families and friends who shop together. Available now on the App Store!

hushGallery.title: Hush Gallery
hushGallery.subtitle: Private photo gallery - Coming soon
hushGallery.description: Hush Gallery is a secure and private photo gallery application that allows you to keep your personal photos safe and organized. With advanced privacy features and intuitive design, it's the perfect solution for protecting your memories.
hushGallery.underConstructionMessage: We're working hard to bring you something amazing. Check back soon!

whistleCamera.title: Whistle Camera
whistleCamera.subtitle: Smart camera app - Coming soon
whistleCamera.description: Whistle Camera is an innovative camera application that brings new features and capabilities to mobile photography. With advanced editing tools and smart filters, capture and enhance your moments like never before.
whistleCamera.underConstructionMessage: We're working hard to bring you something amazing. Check back soon!

section1.title: 1. Information We Collect
section1.content: We collect information you provide directly to us, such as when you create an account, use our services, or contact us for support.

section2.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
section2.content: We use the information we collect to provide, maintain, and improve our services, process transactions, and communicate with you.

section3.title: 3. Information Sharing
section3.content: We do not sell, trade, or otherwise transfer your personal information to third parties without your consent, except as described in this policy.

section4.title: 4. Data Security
section4.content: We implement appropriate security measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction.

section5.title: 5. Your Rights
section5.content: You have the right to access, update, or delete your personal information. You may also opt out of certain communications from us.

section6.title: 6. Camera and Photo Library Access
section6.content: ZuList requires access to your device's camera and photo library to allow you to take and upload photos of shopping list items. We only access these features when you explicitly choose to add a photo to a list or item. Photos are stored securely in our cloud storage and are only accessible to you and users you share your lists with.

section7.title: 7. Crash Reporting and Error Analytics
section7.content: We use Firebase Crashlytics, a service provided by Google, to collect information about app crashes and errors. This helps us identify and fix issues to improve your experience.
dataCollectedItems: Technical information about crashes and errors (stack traces, error messages)
Device information (operating system, device model, app version)
Installation ID (a unique identifier for your app installation, not linked to your personal identity)
Custom diagnostic information related to errors (error codes, operation types)
purposeItems: Identify and fix bugs and crashes
section7.dataSharingContent: This data is processed by Google Firebase and is subject to Google's Privacy Policy.
section7.dataRetentionContent: Crash reports are retained by Firebase for up to 90 days and are then automatically deleted.
section7.yourRightsContent: You can opt-out of crash reporting by disabling it in your device settings, though this may prevent us from fixing issues that affect you.

section8.title: 8. Contact Us
section8.content: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at:

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.intro: Please read these Terms of Use carefully before using ZuList. By accessing or using our service, you agree to be bound by these terms. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our service.

section1.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
section1.content: These Terms of Use ("Terms") govern your access to and use of ZuList ("Service", "App", "we", "us", or "our"), a shopping list application operated by Zuki Apps ("Company"). By downloading, installing, accessing, or using the Service, you agree to be bound by these Terms and our Privacy Policy.
section1.content2: If you are using the Service on behalf of an organization, you represent and warrant that you have the authority to bind that organization to these Terms.

section2.title: 2. Description of Service
section2.content: ZuList is a mobile application that allows users to create, manage, and share shopping lists with family and friends. The Service includes:

items.item6: Premium subscription features (as described in Section 4)

section3.title: 3. User Accounts and Registration
section3.content1: To use certain features of the Service, you must create an account. You can create an account using:

items2.item1: Maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials
items2.item2: All activities that occur under your account
items2.item3: Ensuring that your account information is accurate and up-to-date
items2.item4: Notifying us immediately of any unauthorized use of your account

section3.content3: You must be at least 13 years old to use the Service. If you are under 18, you represent that you have obtained parental or guardian consent to use the Service. If you are a parent or guardian and believe your child has provided us with personal information, please contact us immediately.

section4.title: 4. Premium Subscriptions and Payments
section4.content1: ZuList offers premium subscription plans that provide access to additional features:

items1.item1: Monthly Subscription: Billed monthly, automatically renews unless cancelled
items1.item2: Yearly Subscription: Billed annually, automatically renews unless cancelled

section4.content2: By purchasing a subscription, you agree to:

items2.item1: Pay the subscription fee at the time of purchase
items2.item2: Automatic renewal of your subscription at the end of each billing period
items2.item3: Prices may vary by region and are subject to change with notice

section4.content3: You can manage your subscription, including cancellation, through:

items3.item2: Android: Google Play Store → Subscriptions → ZuList

section4.content3b: If you cancel your subscription, you will continue to have access to premium features until the end of your current billing period. After that, your account will revert to the free tier.
section4.content4: Refund requests are handled by Apple (for iOS) or Google (for Android) according to their respective refund policies. We do not process refunds directly. For subscription refunds, please contact Apple Support or Google Play Support.
section4.content5: If we offer a free trial, it will be clearly indicated at the time of sign-up. At the end of the trial period, your subscription will automatically convert to a paid subscription unless you cancel before the trial ends.

section5.title: 5. User Content and Conduct
section5.content1: You retain ownership of all content you create, upload, or share through the Service ("User Content"), including shopping lists, items, notes, and photos.
section5.content2: By using the Service, you grant us a worldwide, non-exclusive, royalty-free license to:

items2.item1: Store, process, and display your User Content
items2.item2: Share your User Content with other users you explicitly invite to your lists
items2.item3: Use your User Content to provide and improve the Service

section5.content3: You agree not to use the Service to:

items3.item1: Upload, post, or share any content that is illegal, harmful, threatening, abusive, harassing, defamatory, or otherwise objectionable
items3.item2: Impersonate any person or entity or falsely state or misrepresent your affiliation with any person or entity
items3.item3: Violate any applicable laws or regulations
items3.item4: Interfere with or disrupt the Service or servers connected to the Service
items3.item5: Attempt to gain unauthorized access to any portion of the Service
items3.item6: Use automated systems (bots, scrapers) to access the Service without permission
items3.item7: Reverse engineer, decompile, or disassemble any portion of the Service

section6.title: 6. Intellectual Property Rights
section6.content1: The Service, including its original content, features, functionality, design, logos, and trademarks, is owned by Zuki Apps and is protected by international copyright, trademark, and other intellectual property laws.
section6.content2: All Zuli Monsters characters, images, icons, artwork, and related visual content displayed in the ZuList application are the exclusive property of Zuki Apps. These are original creations protected by copyright law and international intellectual property rights.
section6.content2b: Prohibited Uses: You may NOT, without explicit written permission from Zuki Apps:

items2.item1: Copy, reproduce, or duplicate any Zuli Monsters images or characters
items2.item2: Use Zuli Monsters images or characters in any other application, website, or product
items2.item3: Modify, alter, or create derivative works based on Zuli Monsters images or characters
items2.item4: Distribute, sell, or license Zuli Monsters images or characters to third parties
items2.item5: Use Zuli Monsters images or characters for commercial purposes
items2.item6: Remove copyright notices or attribution from Zuli Monsters images or characters

section6.content2c: All rights reserved. Any unauthorized use, reproduction, distribution, or commercial exploitation of Zuli Monsters images or characters constitutes copyright infringement and may result in legal action.
section6.content2d: For licensing inquiries or permission to use Zuli Monsters images or characters, please contact us at zuki.apps.dev@gmail.com.
section6.content3: We grant you a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable, revocable license to access and use the Service for personal, non-commercial purposes in accordance with these Terms.

section7.title: 7. Third-Party Services
section7.content: The Service integrates with third-party services, including:

items.item1: Firebase (Google): For authentication, data storage, and cloud services
items.item5: Apple App Store / Google Play: For in-app purchases and subscriptions

section7.content2: Your use of these third-party services is subject to their respective terms of service and privacy policies. We are not responsible for the practices of these third-party services.

section8.title: 8. Advertising
section8.content: Free tier users may see advertisements displayed within the Service. These advertisements are provided by Google AdMob and are subject to Google's advertising policies. Premium subscribers receive an ad-free experience.
section8.content2: We do not use your personal information to personalize advertisements shown to you, except as permitted by applicable privacy laws and with your consent.

section9.title: 9. Service Availability and Modifications
section9.content1: We strive to provide reliable service but do not guarantee that the Service will be available at all times. The Service may be unavailable due to:

items2.item1: Modify, suspend, or discontinue any part of the Service at any time
items2.item2: Change features, functionality, or pricing with reasonable notice
items2.item3: Impose limits on certain features or restrict access to parts of the Service

section10.title: 10. Termination
section10.content1: You may stop using the Service at any time by:

items1.item1: Deleting your account through the app settings
items1.item2: Uninstalling the app from your device
items1.item3: Contacting us to request account deletion

section10.content2: We may suspend or terminate your access to the Service immediately, without prior notice, if you:

items2.item2: Engage in fraudulent, abusive, or illegal activity
items2.item3: Fail to pay subscription fees (for premium users)

items3.item1: Your right to use the Service will immediately cease
items3.item2: We may delete your account and User Content
items3.item3: You will not be entitled to any refund for unused subscription periods (subject to applicable law)

section11.title: 11. Disclaimers
section11.content: THE SERVICE IS PROVIDED "AS IS" AND "AS AVAILABLE" WITHOUT WARRANTIES OF ANY KIND, EITHER EXPRESS OR IMPLIED, INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO IMPLIED WARRANTIES OF MERCHANTABILITY, FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE, AND NON-INFRINGEMENT.

items.item1: The Service will meet your requirements
items.item2: The Service will be uninterrupted, timely, secure, or error-free
items.item3: The results obtained from using the Service will be accurate or reliable
items.item4: Any errors in the Service will be corrected

section12.title: 12. Limitation of Liability
section12.content: TO THE MAXIMUM EXTENT PERMITTED BY APPLICABLE LAW, IN NO EVENT SHALL ZUKI APPS, ITS AFFILIATES, OR THEIR RESPECTIVE OFFICERS, DIRECTORS, EMPLOYEES, OR AGENTS BE LIABLE FOR ANY INDIRECT, INCIDENTAL, SPECIAL, CONSEQUENTIAL, OR PUNITIVE DAMAGES, INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO LOSS OF PROFITS, DATA, USE, OR OTHER INTANGIBLE LOSSES, RESULTING FROM YOUR USE OR INABILITY TO USE THE SERVICE.
section12.content2: Our total liability to you for all claims arising from or related to the Service shall not exceed the amount you paid us in the twelve (12) months preceding the claim, or $100, whichever is greater.

section13.title: 13. Indemnification
section13.content: You agree to indemnify, defend, and hold harmless Zuki Apps, its affiliates, and their respective officers, directors, employees, and agents from and against any and all claims, damages, obligations, losses, liabilities, costs, or debt, and expenses (including attorney's fees) arising from:

items.item3: Your violation of any third-party rights
items.item4: Any User Content you submit, post, or transmit through the Service

section14.title: 14. Privacy
section14.content: Your privacy is important to us. Our collection and use of your personal information is governed by our Privacy Policy, which is incorporated into these Terms by reference.

section15.title: 15. Dispute Resolution
section15.content1: These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of Israel, without regard to its conflict of law provisions.
section15.content2: If you have any concerns or disputes regarding the Service, please contact us first at zuki.apps.dev@gmail.com. We will attempt to resolve any disputes in good faith.

section16.title: 16. Changes to Terms
section16.content: We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time. We will notify you of any material changes by:

items.item1: Posting the updated Terms on this page
items.item3: Sending a notification through the Service (if significant changes are made)

section16.content2: Your continued use of the Service after such changes constitutes your acceptance of the modified Terms.

section17.title: 17. Severability
section17.content: If any provision of these Terms is found to be unenforceable or invalid, that provision shall be limited or eliminated to the minimum extent necessary, and the remaining provisions shall remain in full force and effect.

section18.title: 18. Entire Agreement
section18.content: These Terms, together with our Privacy Policy, constitute the entire agreement between you and Zuki Apps regarding the Service and supersede all prior agreements and understandings.

section19.title: 19. Contact Information
section19.content: If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact us:

deleteAccount.title: Delete ZuList Account
deleteAccount.intro: If you wish to delete your account and all associated data, please follow the steps below:

warning.title: ⚠️ Important Warning
warning.content: Account deletion is a permanent action and cannot be undone. All data associated with your account will be permanently deleted.

steps.title: Account Deletion Instructions
steps.step1: Open the ZuList app on your device
steps.step2: Log in to your account (if you haven't already)
steps.step3: Tap the Profile button (or Settings) in the bottom menu
steps.step4: Scroll down until you find the Delete account button (or Delete account)
steps.step5: Tap the button and read the message
steps.step6: Confirm the deletion - the account and all data will be permanently deleted

data.title: Data That Will Be Deleted
data.intro: When you delete your account, the following data will be permanently deleted:
data.item1: Personal information: name, email address, user ID
data.item2: Shopping lists: all shopping lists you created
data.item3: Items: all items in your lists
data.item4: Photos: profile photos, list photos, item photos
data.item5: Preferences: personal settings and user preferences
data.item6: Purchase history: all statistical data and history

owner.title: Lists you created (Owner):
owner.item1: If there are other users in the list → Ownership will be transferred to another user (automatically)
owner.item2: If you are the only one in the list → The list will be completely deleted

member.title: Lists you participate in (Member):
member.item1: You will be removed from the list
member.item2: The list will remain active for other users
member.item3: Data and items will remain (only you will be removed)

partialDelete.title: Deleting Some Data (Without Deleting the Account)
partialDelete.intro: If you wish to delete only some data without deleting the account, you can:
partialDelete.item1: Delete profile photos: Profile screen → Remove photo
partialDelete.item2: Delete lists: Home screen → Delete list
partialDelete.item3: Delete items: Inside a list → Delete item

retention.title: Retention Period
retention.content: After account deletion, data will be deleted from our servers within 30 days. During this period, data may be retained in backups, but will not be accessible through the app.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.content: If you have questions or issues with account deletion, please contact us:

intro.title: Deleting Data Without Deleting the Account
intro.content: You can delete some of your data without deleting the account. This way you can keep the account and delete only the data you want to remove.

types.title: Types of Data You Can Delete

profilePhotos.title: 1. Profile Photos
profilePhotos.step2: Tap the Profile button in the bottom menu
profilePhotos.step4: Select Remove Image or Remove Image

shoppingLists.title: 2. Shopping Lists
shoppingLists.step2: On the home screen, find the list you want to delete
shoppingLists.step3: Long press on the list (or tap three dots)
shoppingLists.step4: Select Delete List or Delete List

items.title: 3. Items in Lists
items.keptItem3: All other items in the list
items.step2: Open the list containing the item
items.step3: Long press on the item (or swipe left)

images.title: 4. List and Item Photos
images.step3: Select Remove Image or Remove Image

purchaseHistory.title: 5. Purchase History and Statistical Data
purchaseHistory.deletedItem1: Purchase history (when items marked as purchased are deleted)

note.title: Note:
note.content: Deleting purchase history is done automatically when items or lists are deleted. No separate action is required.

info.title: ℹ️ Important Information:
info.item1: Data deletion is immediate - data is deleted immediately from the device and cloud
info.item3: If you participate in shared lists, deleting items/lists will also affect other users
info.item4: Your account will remain active even after deleting data

retention.title: Retention Period
retention.content: Deleted data will be removed from our servers within 30 days. During this period, data may be retained in backups, but will not be accessible through the app.

fullDelete.title: Want to delete the entire account?
fullDelete.content: If you wish to delete the entire account and all associated data,
fullDelete.link: click here for full account deletion

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.content: If you have questions or issues with data deletion, please contact us:

support.title: Support & Help
support.subtitle: We're here to help! Find answers to common questions or contact us directly.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: Have a question or need assistance? Send us an email and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.description: Learn how we protect your data

q1.question: How do I share a shopping list with family members?
q1.answer: To share a list, open the list and tap the 'Share' or 'Members' button. You can invite members via email, SMS, WhatsApp, or by sharing a link. Once they accept the invitation, they'll have access to the list and can add or modify items in real-time.

q2.question: How does the Premium subscription work?
q2.answer: Premium offers unlimited lists, unlimited items, unlimited members, ad-free experience, advanced statistics, custom themes, offline mode, and cloud backup. You can subscribe monthly or yearly through the App Store (iOS) or Google Play (Android). You can manage or cancel your subscription at any time through your device's subscription settings.

q3.question: Can I use ZuList offline?
q3.answer: Yes! ZuList works offline. You can create lists, add items, and mark items as purchased even without an internet connection. All changes will automatically sync when you're back online. Note: Offline mode is a Premium feature.

q4.question: How do I delete my account?
q4.answer: To delete your account, go to Profile → Settings → Delete Account. Please note that account deletion is permanent and cannot be undone. All your data, including lists, items, and photos, will be permanently deleted. For detailed instructions, visit our Delete Account page.

q5.question: I'm having trouble with notifications. What should I do?
q5.answer: First, make sure notifications are enabled in your device settings for ZuList. If notifications still don't work, try: 1) Restarting the app, 2) Checking your device's notification settings, 3) Ensuring you have an active internet connection, 4) Reinstalling the app if the problem persists. If issues continue, please contact us.

q6.question: How do I restore my data if I switch devices?
q6.answer: If you're using the same account (Google or Apple Sign-In), your data will automatically sync when you log in on a new device. Make sure you're connected to the internet and signed in with the same account. Premium users have cloud backup enabled, ensuring all data is safely stored and can be restored.

additionalHelp.title: Need More Help?
additionalHelp.description: If you couldn't find the answer you're looking for, or if you're experiencing a technical issue, please don't hesitate to contact us. We're here to help and typically respond within 24-48 hours.
